title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I may have just thrown up in my mouth a little...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GAO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's comedic, ain't it? You, a "life about to end", standing in front of and watching a "life that just began"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn... that was pretty deep... it's like I'm waxing poetic over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pekoms... I gave you a way out... what's about to happen here ...that's all on you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "A way out" my ass.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GAO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had some inklings about you during that whole "Zou" incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys like you... full of compassion and empathy... they're doomed to fail in our line of work.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: admit it... you were never cut out for this world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This coast right here... you won't find a better location for making UN- Desirables 'disappear'.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once they're done with you, not a single hair on that head of yours will remain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Any last words?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAAAA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WaaaaAA A!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Under- Estimating Mama will be your downfall !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bwaaa Aah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: whole cake chateau "The Queen's Chamber"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been sending you a surplus of funds...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Haven't I, Caesar clown??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: y-y-yes, of course!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been diligently and faithfully continuing my research as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My dream...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is to become "family" with all of the races of the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to enjoy a meal with my diverse family at eye level while we sit around with not a care in the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ceesar... you and you alone are my only hope of making this dream a reality.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were to use the power of science to gigantify my entire family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every time I called in to check on you, you'd tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How close you were to putting the finishing touches on your research!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that you simply needed more funding to make that final push across the finish line.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd get giddy with anticipation every time you told me that... and with no hesitation, I made sure you got your money! So tell me, how's it all going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: IT... is going... Amazingly, thanks to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gigantification of humans... obviously, all my experiments and research have been focused in that field. After all, perfecting such a recipe would make me the most sought after scientist in the world!! Having said that, the research I've been doing has been primarily on converting brats into Giants!! I haven

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's become painfully clear that creating a magical drug that simply lets an individual grow in physical feature without any side effects, impossible!! That's why I've been milking this crazy Hag for all she's worth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and spending all those excess funds on the finest booze 'and women from my favorite "Girls ship" ... sneaking them onto the island was the highlight of my night!! Shurororo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such good times... I was able to do as I please on my own watch while hiding behind the joker's shadow!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never imagined the jokes would have his ass handed to him and that I'd end up in this precious situation.!!!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
